disclaimer: ECPL operating expenses for 1 Apr 2025 – 28 Feb 2026 are taken from the CA P&L workbook (cleaned JSON in this app). That is the main expense total unless superseded by a statutory filing. Other parties (Space Within, STPL) use their own bank/GST files. Click “Show reconciled data” under each question to open the linked snapshot.

questions.title: How much profit have we made so far (ECPL)?
questions.summary: For ECPL, the P&L through 28-Feb-26 in the attached workbook is now the primary picture: gross sales ₹4,73,45,661; net profit before depreciation ≈ ₹42,38,326 (depreciation ₹0 in file). Printed invoices through the same date match books within ~₹10k; full PDF pack is higher because March 2026 invoices sit outside this P&L window.

figures.label: Net profit (P&L file)
figures.note: From pl_main.json · confirm with your CA / tax return.

figures.label: Gross sales (P&L = sales register)
figures.note: Matches Sales Register gross total in workbook.

figures.label: Total indirect expenses (P&L)
figures.note: Includes salary, petty, Nakul-bucket IT/website lines, etc.

questions.advice: Treat this app as an evidence board: every headline number should trace to a JSON snapshot or bank export.

questions.title: How much rent is owed to Harshad Mehta (accrual)?
questions.summary: Policy accrual (Oct 2024 – Mar 2026 @ ₹1L/mo) is separate from ECPL books. On ECPL P&L (Apr 25 – Feb 26) rent expensed is ₹11,70,000 — that is factory/ops rent in the monthly schedule, not automatically the full Harshad accrual window.

figures.label: Rent in ECPL P&L (Apr’25–Feb’26)
figures.note: See monthly breakdown + P&L Rent line.

gaps: Map P&L rent payee to Harshad vs other
questions.advice: If Harshad rent is split across ECPL + SW, build one rent_ledger.csv covering both banks.

questions.title: How much have we paid Harshad so far (rent)?
questions.summary: ECPL Axis snapshot: ₹2,46,500 NEFT to NAKUL HARSHAD MEHTA; optional ₹2,00,000 cash ‘NAKUL ME’ if you count it as rent. Space Within payments require a separate tagged export.

figures.label: NEFT to NAKUL HARSHAD MEHTA
figures.note: Six lines in ECPL Axis extract.

gaps: Space Within HDFC tagged to Harshad
questions.advice: Refresh bank JSON whenever you re-parse the Axis PDF/CSV.

questions.title: What advance / income tax was paid for Harshad Mehta?
questions.summary: Formula: 30% × Space Within profit. Payments are expected on Space Within HDFC — not in ECPL P&L. No SW bank snapshot is loaded in this app yet.
gaps: Export Space Within bank with ITNS/OLTAS tags
questions.advice: Add a manifest entry + JSON when you have a cleaned extract.

questions.title: How much OD interest (Space Within) and what is pending vs ECPL?
questions.summary: Interest debits sit on Space Within HDFC. This app does not yet ship a cleaned SW interest JSON — figures in the narrative are from a prior manual pass.
gaps: Publish sw_od_interest.json from tagged HDFC master
questions.advice: Export Oct’24–Mar’26 interest lines with reconciliation_display_source.

questions.title: How much does ECPL owe Nakul and STPL?
questions.summary: STPL→ECPL bank credits (indicative ₹85.75L) and ECPL→Harshad/Nakul debits are evidence only — not closing balances without ledgers.
questions.advice: Use intercompany_matrix.csv in addition to bank JSON.

evidence.label: Direct payments to Harshad / Nakul ME

questions.title: How much does STPL owe ECPL?
questions.summary: Needs trade receivables + loan schedule. Bank snapshot shows money into ECPL from STPL, not STPL’s payable to ECPL.
questions.advice: Link STPL sales invoices + Tally outstanding.

questions.title: What is still missing for a clean close?
questions.summary: ECPL P&L through Feb 26 is now in-app. Remaining: Mar 26+ activity, Space Within tagged bank (rent/tax/interest), full intercompany ledgers, and statutory tie-out.
questions.advice: Track coverage in the checklist sample until each stream has a manifest dataset.

suggestions_next_steps: Run python scripts/export_ecpl_pl_workbook.py after updating the CA Excel.
Add Space Within HDFC JSON snapshots for rent, tax, and OD interest with the same view types as bank_lines / key_values.
Keep one kpis.json that only references other dataset_ids + amounts for auditors.
